title: FBI Files related to Prince David Peter Abashidze held by the National Archive and Records Administration

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

A review and release of all FBI documents related to Prince David Peter Abashidze. Abashidze was a naturalized U.S. citizen who was fluent in Georgian, Russian and English who maintained a business relationship with the Soviet state. A recent FOIA request with the FBI indicated that potentially responsive files related to Abashidze were transferred to NARA.

Full Name: David Peter Abashidze
Title: Prince
Date of Birth: July 17th 1878 - Tbilisi, Georgia (Imperial Russian Empire)
Date of Death: July 11 1952 - New York City

Link to FBI response with file numbers: https://cdn.muckrock.com/foia_files/2026/04/23/Ed8f919513eefbe69116d5b619a3cf2ffe404f9445dd3c37595_Q320999_D165821705.pdf

The following file numbers were cited by the bureau as being relevant to David Peter Abashidze and are now under the control of NARA:

100-HQ-225773 
100-SF-18884 
100-SF-24095-567
100-SF-25972-2 
100-SF17879 serials 453, 459, 534, 694, 776 
100-SF-16980A-345-347 
100-SF-24095-1B5

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, please conduct a review and release of the file numbers indicated above.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Robert Delaware

communications.subject: California Public Records Act Request: Flock Safety audit logs
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the California Public Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

1. Organization Audit from Flock system
The report should include data logged from the period of November 1, 2025, to the date this request is processed. Per Flock's documentation, the Organization Audit is available within the Insights tab and is defined as searches done within the agency.

2. Network Audit from Flock system
The report should include data logged from the period of November 1, 2025, to the date this request is processed. Per Flock's documentation, the Network Audit is available within the Insights tab and is defined as searches of the organization’s Flock network by any agency in the Flock System.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 calendar days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Elliott Balsley
